heading: Today
text: Sun, mixing with a few clouds. Some patchy smoke in NY late.  Highs in the 70s north, 80 to 85 south.  Winds northwest near 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear in the evening, giving way to increasing clouds west to east.  Lows in the 50s, a few upper 40s in the cold spots northeast.  Wind diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Saturday
text: Any morning sun giving way to clouds, and areas of smoke.  Showers or a thunderstorm spreading east in the morning through Quebec, edging south to the Adirondacks, Rt. 4, and White Mountains midday and afternoon.  A rising chance of showers southwest in the afternoon.  Highs in the 70s to near 80 north, 80s south.  Light winds, becoming south near 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph west of the Green Mountains.
